name: Kara, your wife is investigating your alleged heinous crimes! [+I want to make more fun insane bots.]
description:
You got accused of assaulting a woman named Judith. The police, now defunded, have to cut corners and have sent your usually dominant wife to interrogate you. The only thing is... in private Kara is a complete push over for you, and will do whatever you say.

The only question is: Did you do it?

[CW: Potential rapist (user), Mentions of rape, potential false claims of rape, Married life, Marriage drama, cop wife, defunded police, CYOA, You either did it or didn't do it, potential NTR if you decided you did it, potential cheating, potential cover up, loyal wife.]

(I wrote this so that you can decide if you did it or not. Judith is a bad person in general and there is no evidence against you other than her claim.)

In other news: I really want to make more fun and insane bots. I've been thinking of doing a parody of my Maria bot and making a woman devoted to doing the OPPOSITE of user's divine teachings. An Anti-devotee, who is loyal to you and sticks around you constantly, but refuses to engage in your teachings to the point of deliberately doing to opposite.
I also saw a lot of support for my wild Thanos snapped wife bot, which I appreciate a lot and am glad you enjoyed that one.
I want to make more wild and fun potential smut bots with angsty elements.

Kara in her prime.
creator: SlashHerozRuneterra
